text: Hi! I ordered a box of your malasadas yesterday. Do you ship to Seattle or only local pickup?
Hi Mei! We ship nationwide via 2-day priority. Seattle orders arrive fresh with our insulated packaging. Shipping is $12 flat rate.
Perfect, that works for me! I'll go ahead and complete my order now. Thank you!
Hi, I bought a sourdough loaf yesterday but it was completely underbaked inside. Can I get a refund or replacement?
Hi Kenji! So sorry about that — that's not the experience we want for you. Absolutely, bring the loaf in and we'll replace it or issue a full refund, your choice.
Thank you, I'll stop by tomorrow morning. Really appreciate the quick response!
Hi! Just wanted to confirm my cake pickup appointment for tomorrow at 10am. This is Grace Webb.
Hi Grace! Yes, your order is confirmed for tomorrow at 10am. We'll have everything ready for you at Koa Morning Star Bakery. See you then!
Perfect, thank you so much! Looking forward to it.
Hi! What are your store hours? I want to stop by this weekend.
Aloha Leilani! We're open Tue–Sun, 7am–2pm. Closed Mondays. Saturday is our busiest day so come early for the best selection!
Perfect, I'll come Sunday morning. Mahalo!
Hi! Do you still have the ube croissants available today?
Hi Juno! Yes, we have a few left — about 6 pieces. We close at 6pm today. Would you like to reserve some?
Yes please, can you hold 2 for me? I'll pick up around 4.
Hi, I made a payment yesterday for my cake order but haven't received a receipt yet. Can you help?
Hi Chloe! Thanks for reaching out. Could you share the last 4 digits of the card used or the order number so I can pull it up?
Sure! Order #1042, paid with a card ending in 7823.
